'''âr-w-ng''' ('''karawang''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unbelt|unbelt]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-w-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unbelt|unbelt]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-w-ng
|-
! Lemma
| karawang
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirawang|thirawang]] || [[word:jirawang|jirawang]] || [[word:shirawang|shirawang]] || [[word:kirawang|kirawang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurawang|thuthurawang]] || [[word:jujurawang|jujurawang]] || [[word:shushurawang|shushurawang]] || [[word:kukurawang|kukurawang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thurawang|thurawang]] || [[word:jurawang|jurawang]] || [[word:shurawang|shurawang]] || [[word:kurawang|kurawang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thurawang|thurawang]] || [[word:jurawang|jurawang]] || [[word:shurawang|shurawang]] || [[word:kurawang|kurawang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:therawang|therawang]] || [[word:jerawang|jerawang]] || [[word:sherawang|sherawang]] || [[word:kerawang|kerawang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothorawang|thothorawang]] || [[word:jojorawang|jojorawang]] || [[word:shoshorawang|shoshorawang]] || [[word:kokorawang|kokorawang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorawang|thorawang]] || [[word:jorawang|jorawang]] || [[word:shorawang|shorawang]] || [[word:korawang|korawang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorawang|thorawang]] || [[word:jorawang|jorawang]] || [[word:shorawang|shorawang]] || [[word:korawang|korawang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠrawang|thĂŠrawang]] || [[word:jĂŠrawang|jĂŠrawang]] || [[word:shĂŠrawang|shĂŠrawang]] || [[word:kĂŠrawang|kĂŠrawang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharawang|thatharawang]] || [[word:jajarawang|jajarawang]] || [[word:shasharawang|shasharawang]] || [[word:kakarawang|kakarawang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharawang|tharawang]] || [[word:jarawang|jarawang]] || [[word:sharawang|sharawang]] || [[word:karawang|karawang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharawang|tharawang]] || [[word:jarawang|jarawang]] || [[word:sharawang|sharawang]] || [[word:karawang|karawang]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:sharawang|sharawang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosharawang|gosharawang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisharawang|gokisharawang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:sharawangnĂŒ|sharawangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosharawangnknĂŒ|gosharawangnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisharawangnĂŒ|gokisharawangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sharawangshĂ«|sharawangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosharawangnkshĂ«|gosharawangnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisharawangshĂ«|gokisharawangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharawangro|sharawangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharawangnkro|gosharawangnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharawangro|gokisharawangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sharawangmu|sharawangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharawangnkmu|gosharawangnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharawangmu|gokisharawangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sharawangsher|sharawangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosharawangnksher|gosharawangnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisharawangsher|gokisharawangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:sharawang|sharawang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosharawangnkng|gosharawangnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisharawang|gokisharawang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:sharawangya|sharawangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosharawangnkya|gosharawangnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisharawangya|gokisharawangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sharawangyam|sharawangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosharawangnkyam|gosharawangnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisharawangyam|gokisharawangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharawangnĂŒshĂ«|sharawangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharawangnknĂŒshĂ«|gosharawangnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharawangnĂŒshĂ«|gokisharawangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharawangnĂŒro|sharawangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharawangnknĂŒro|gosharawangnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharawangnĂŒro|gokisharawangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharawangnĂŒmu|sharawangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharawangnknĂŒmu|gosharawangnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharawangnĂŒmu|gokisharawangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharawangshĂ«nĂŒ|sharawangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharawangnkshĂ«nĂŒ|gosharawangnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharawangshĂ«nĂŒ|gokisharawangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharawangshĂ«ro|sharawangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharawangnkshĂ«ro|gosharawangnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharawangshĂ«ro|gokisharawangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharawangshĂ«mu|sharawangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharawangnkshĂ«mu|gosharawangnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharawangshĂ«mu|gokisharawangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharawangronĂŒ|sharawangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharawangnkronĂŒ|gosharawangnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharawangronĂŒ|gokisharawangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharawangroshĂ«|sharawangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharawangnkroshĂ«|gosharawangnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharawangroshĂ«|gokisharawangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharawangromu|sharawangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharawangnkromu|gosharawangnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharawangromu|gokisharawangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharawangmunĂŒ|sharawangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharawangnkmunĂŒ|gosharawangnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharawangmunĂŒ|gokisharawangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharawangmushĂ«|sharawangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharawangnkmushĂ«|gosharawangnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharawangmushĂ«|gokisharawangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharawangmuro|sharawangmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharawangnkmuro|gosharawangnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharawangmuro|gokisharawangmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
